calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Laurence Vinocur's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and [Proposed] consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and a separate judgment signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
